neighborhoods.name: Rovinj Old Town
neighborhoods.description: Venetian-style hilltop old town on a peninsula with cobblestone streets, art galleries, and fishing harbor
neighborhoods.character: Venetian historic, artistic, compact and walkable

housing.predominantType: Stone apartments in medieval and Venetian buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Rovinj. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Porec
neighborhoods.description: Coastal town with UNESCO basilica, good infrastructure, and a mix of tourism and residential life
neighborhoods.character: Coastal residential, good infrastructure, seasonal tourism

housing.predominantType: Modern apartments, houses, and vacation properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Rovinj's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Pazin
neighborhoods.description: Inland Istrian capital with medieval castle, lower costs, and access to hilltop villages
neighborhoods.character: Inland small town, affordable, cultural heritage

housing.predominantType: Older houses, apartments, and stone village properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Umag / Novigrad
neighborhoods.description: Northern coastal towns near the Slovenian border with international feel and tennis/sports tourism
neighborhoods.character: Coastal, international, sports and wine culture

housing.predominantType: Modern apartments, villas, and holiday properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
